name: Muang Thai Insurance Public Company Limited
summary: Muang Thai Insurance Public Company Limited provides non-life insurance products and services in Thailand. The company offers motor insurance; and non-motor products that include property, marine and transportation, engineering, personal accident and health, special products, liability, and miscellaneous insurance products, as well as travel and commercial insurance products. It also invests in various securities, as well as engages in reinsurance business. The company is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
